framework.name: National Security Audit Criteria (Katakri)
framework.scope: Security audit criteria for organizations handling classified information. Used by the National Security Authority (NSA-FI) to audit facilities processing national security classified data.
framework.structure_description: Three areas: T (Turvallisuusjohtaminen/Security Management), F (Fyysinen turvallisuus/Physical Security), I (Tekninen tietoturvallisuus/Technical Information Security). Three classification levels: IV (Restricted), III (Confidential), II (Secret).

controls.title: Security policy
controls.description_nl: Organisaatiolla on oltava johdon hyvaksyma turvallisuuspolitiikka, joka kattaa kansallisen turvallisuuden nakokulman.
controls.description: The organization shall have a management-approved security policy covering national security aspects.

controls.title: Security organization
controls.description_nl: Turvallisuusvastuut on maariteltava ja turvallisuusorganisaatio on perustettava. Turvallisuuspaallikon on oltava suoraan johdon alainen.
controls.description: Security responsibilities shall be defined and a security organization established. The security manager shall report directly to management.

controls.title: Risk management
controls.description_nl: Turvallisuusriskien arviointi on suoritettava jarjestelmallisesti. Arvioinnin on katettava fyysinen, henkilosto- ja tietoturvallisuus.
controls.description: Security risk assessment shall be performed systematically covering physical, personnel, and information security.

controls.title: Security agreements
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavan tiedon kasittelyyn liittyvat turvallisuussopimukset on laadittava kaikkien osapuolten kanssa.
controls.description: Security agreements related to classified information handling shall be established with all parties.

controls.title: Security training
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavia tietoja kasitteleville henkiloille on jarjestettava turvallisuuskoulutus ennen kaytto-oikeuksien myontamista.
controls.description: Security training shall be provided to persons handling classified information before granting access rights.

controls.title: Security incident management
controls.description_nl: Turvallisuuspoikkeamien tunnistamiseen, raportointiin ja kasittelyyn on oltava menettelyt. Poikkeamista on ilmoitettava toimivaltaiselle viranomaiselle.
controls.description: Procedures shall exist for identifying, reporting, and handling security incidents. Incidents shall be reported to the competent authority.

controls.title: Security auditing
controls.description_nl: Turvallisuusjarjestelyjen riittavyys on auditoitava saannollisesti. Auditoinnin tulokset on raportoitava johdolle.
controls.description: Adequacy of security arrangements shall be audited regularly. Audit results shall be reported to management.

controls.title: Security documentation
controls.description_nl: Turvallisuusjarjestelyt on dokumentoitava kattavasti. Dokumentaatio on pidettava ajan tasalla ja suojattava.
controls.description: Security arrangements shall be documented comprehensively. Documentation shall be kept up to date and protected.

controls.title: Continuity management
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavien tietojen kasittelyyn kaytettavien jarjestelmien jatkuvuussuunnitelmat on laadittava ja testattava.
controls.description: Continuity plans for systems used to process classified information shall be prepared and tested.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description_nl: Turvallisuuteen vaikuttavat muutokset on hallittava muutoshallintamenettelylla.
controls.description: Changes affecting security shall be managed through a change management process.

controls.title: Security zone definition
controls.description_nl: Tilat on jaettava turva-alueisiin suojaustason mukaan. Hallinnollinen alue, turva-alue ja ytimen turva-alue on maariteltava.
controls.description: Premises shall be divided into security zones according to protection level. Administrative area, security area, and core security area shall be defined.

controls.title: Access control
controls.description_nl: Turva-alueille on toteutettava kulunvalvonta, joka estaa luvattoman paasyn. Kulkuoikeudet on rajattava tarpeen mukaan.
controls.description: Access control preventing unauthorized entry shall be implemented for security zones. Access rights shall be limited based on need.

controls.title: Structural protection
controls.description_nl: Turva-alueiden seinien, ovien, ikkunoiden ja muiden rakenteiden on taytettava suojaustason mukaiset vaatimukset.
controls.description: Walls, doors, windows, and other structures of security zones shall meet requirements according to protection level.

controls.title: Intrusion detection system
controls.description_nl: Turva-alueilla on kaytettava murtoilmaisinjarjestelmaa, joka havahtyy luvattomasta tunkeutumisyrityksesta.
controls.description: An intrusion detection system detecting unauthorized entry attempts shall be used in security zones.

controls.title: Camera surveillance
controls.description_nl: Turva-alueiden valvontaan on kaytettava kameravalvontaa. Tallenteet on sailytettava vahintaan 30 vuorokautta.
controls.description: Camera surveillance shall be used for security zone monitoring. Recordings shall be retained for at least 30 days.

controls.title: Visitor management
controls.description_nl: Vierailijoiden paasynhallinta turva-alueille on toteutettava. Vierailijat on saatettava turva-alueella.
controls.description: Visitor access management to security zones shall be implemented. Visitors shall be escorted in security zones.

controls.title: Equipment room protection
controls.description_nl: Palvelin- ja verkkolaitetilat on suojattava turva-alueen vaatimusten mukaisesti.
controls.description: Server and network equipment rooms shall be protected according to security zone requirements.

controls.title: Fire safety
controls.description_nl: Turva-alueiden paloturvallisuus on varmistettava paloilmaisin-, sammutuslaitteisto- ja evakuointijarjestelyin.
controls.description: Fire safety of security zones shall be ensured with fire detection, suppression equipment, and evacuation arrangements.

controls.title: Classified material storage
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettava aineisto on sailytettava luokitusta vastaavissa turvakaapeissa tai -holveissa.
controls.description: Classified material shall be stored in security cabinets or vaults corresponding to the classification level.

controls.title: Media destruction
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavaa tietoa sisaltavat tietovalineet on haveittava hyvaksytylla menetelmalla.
controls.description: Media containing classified information shall be destroyed using an approved method.

controls.title: Electromagnetic protection (TEMPEST)
controls.description_nl: TL II ja TL III -tason tietoja kasittelevien tilojen sahkomagneettinen suojaus on arvioitava ja toteutettava.
controls.description: Electromagnetic protection of rooms processing TL II and TL III level information shall be assessed and implemented.

controls.title: Backup power arrangements
controls.description_nl: Kriittisille turva-alueille on jarjestettava varavoimansyotto.
controls.description: Backup power supply shall be arranged for critical security zones.

controls.title: Information system accreditation
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavia tietoja kasittelevat tietojarjestelmat on hyvaksyttava ennen kayttoonottoa. Hyvaksyminen perustuu riskiarviointiin.
controls.description: Information systems processing classified information shall be accredited before deployment. Accreditation is based on risk assessment.

controls.title: Network isolation
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavia tietoja kasittelevat verkot on eristettava julkisesta verkosta. TL III ja TL II tasoisille tiedoille on kaytettava erillisverkkoja.
controls.description: Networks processing classified information shall be isolated from public networks. Separate networks shall be used for TL III and TL II level information.

controls.title: Encryption methods
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavien tietojen salaukseen on kaytettava turvallisuusviranomaisen hyvaksymia salausmenetelmia ja -tuotteita.
controls.description: Approved encryption methods and products shall be used for encrypting classified information.

controls.title: Access rights management
controls.description_nl: Kayttooikeudet salassa pidettaviin tietoihin on myonnettava tarvittaessa tiedot -periaatteella. Oikeudet on katselmoitava saannollisesti.
controls.description: Access rights to classified information shall be granted on a need-to-know basis. Rights shall be reviewed regularly.

controls.title: Strong authentication
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavia tietoja kasitteleviin jarjestelmiin on kirjauduttava vahvalla tunnistautumisella (vahintaan kaksivaiheinen).
controls.description: Strong authentication (at least two-factor) shall be used to log into systems processing classified information.

controls.title: Logging and traceability
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavien tietojen kasittelytapahtumat on lokitettava. Lokitiedoista on voitava selvittaa, kuka on kayttanyt mitakin tietoa.
controls.description: Processing events for classified information shall be logged. It shall be possible to determine from logs who accessed what information.

controls.title: Malware protection
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavia tietoja kasittelevat jarjestelmat on suojattava haittaohjelmilta.
controls.description: Systems processing classified information shall be protected against malware.

controls.title: Patch management
controls.description_nl: Tietoturvapaivitykset on asennettava viipymatta. Paivitysten yhteensopivuus on testattava ennen asennusta.
controls.description: Security patches shall be installed promptly. Patch compatibility shall be tested before installation.

controls.title: System hardening
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavia tietoja kasittelevat jarjestelmat on kovennettava poistamalla tarpeettomat palvelut ja ominaisuudet.
controls.description: Systems processing classified information shall be hardened by removing unnecessary services and features.

controls.title: Data removal
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavat tiedot on poistettava turvallisesti jarjestelmista, kun niita ei enaa tarvita.
controls.description: Classified information shall be securely removed from systems when no longer needed.

controls.title: Removable media management
controls.description_nl: Siirrettavien tietovalineiden kaytto salassa pidettavien tietojen siirtoon on rajoitettava ja valvottava.
controls.description: Use of removable media for transferring classified information shall be restricted and monitored.

controls.title: Backup
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavien tietojen varmuuskopiot on laadittava ja sailytettava samalla suojaustasolla kuin alkuperaiset tiedot.
controls.description: Backups of classified information shall be created and stored at the same protection level as the original data.

controls.title: Security testing
controls.description_nl: Salassa pidettavia tietoja kasittelevien jarjestelmien tietoturvallisuus on testattava saannollisesti.
controls.description: Security of systems processing classified information shall be tested regularly.
